name: Peppermint Swirl Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: Hard Peppermint Candies (1/2 cup, coarsely chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the graham cracker crust by combining the ingredients as shown in the basic recipe.
2. Add 1 teaspoon of peppermint extract to the cheesecake batter along with vanilla extract.
3. Reserve 1 cup of the batter.
4. Pour the remaining batter into a prepared pan.
5. To the reserved batter, add half a cup of coarsely chopped hard peppermint candies and 1-2 drops of red food coloring. Mix well and swirl into the batter in the pan.
6. Bake according to the basic recipe instructions.
7. Garnish the chilled cake with crushed peppermint candies just before serving, if desired.
